topic.name: Renewable Energy and Transportation
topic.description: Legislation aimed at promoting renewable energy sources and the development of electric vehicles in the United States.

extends income and excise tax credits for alcohol used as fuel
Document 2: Alaska Native Energy Assistance Program Act
provides financial assistance for the payment of residential electric bills
Document 3: American Electric Vehicle Manufacturing Act
establish a two-phased program to award funds for the manufacture, testing, and delivery of electric drive vehicles

topic.name: Wildlife Management Legislation

Central Everglades Planning Project, Florida

state regulation of gray wolves if the population meets or exceeds the applicable number

topic.name: Medicare Legislation and Access
topic.description: This topic encompasses various legislative acts aimed at improving access to Medicare services and benefits, particularly in relation to cancer screening and immune globulin treatments.

Document 1: eliminate the 20% coinsurance for screening mammography
colorectal cancer screening tests
Document 2: Medicare coverage of and payment for intravenous immune globulin
additional payment to such physicians for all items related to the furnishing of immune globulins
Document 3: authorize an option for any citizen or permanent resident of the United States to buy into Medicare
satisfies the requirements of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act

topic.name: Labor Relations and Employee Rights
topic.description: This topic encompasses the legal frameworks and legislative measures that protect employee rights and regulate labor relations, particularly regarding collective bargaining and workplace protections.

Document 1: Amends the National Labor Relations Act (NLRA) to make it an unlawful labor practice for a labor organization or its agents to interfere with the rights of employees to organize and select representation to collectively bargain.
Requires the NLRB to decide, before the election of a labor organization as the exclusive collective bargaining representative...
Document 2: This bill amends the National Labor Relations Act to require the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) to award back pay and additional liquidated damages equal to double the back pay...
Whenever it is charged that an employer has engaged in an unfair labor practice that significantly interferes with, restrains, or coerces employees in the exercise of guaranteed rights...
Document 3: Prohibits the wages or other remuneration earned by an employee who performs employment duties in more than one state from being subject to income tax in any state other than...
Exempts employers from withholding of tax and information reporting requirements for employees not subject to income tax under this Act.

topic.name: Housing Assistance Programs
topic.description: This topic encompasses various legislative measures aimed at providing financial assistance and resources for housing-related issues, particularly for vulnerable populations such as low-income families and veterans.

Document 1: Amends the Residential Lead-Based Paint Hazard Reduction Act of 1992 to revise the purpose for grants for lead-based paint hazard reduction in target housing.

Authorizes the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) to establish a process by which, in order to verify a family's income level, a grantee may first obtain and use income and program participation information.
Document 2: Directs the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) to establish a pilot program to award grants to nonprofit organizations that primarily serve veterans or low-income individuals.
Requires such grants to be used to rehabilitate and modify the primary residence of disabled or low-income veterans.

topic.name: Legislative Reforms in Federal Law
topic.description: This cluster of documents discusses various legislative reforms aimed at improving federal regulations and processes across different sectors, including social security, immigration courts, and energy production.

Document 1: Amends title II (Old Age, Survivors and Disability Insurance) (OASDI) of the Social Security Act
sets forth procedures for the consideration of such a joint resolution.
Document 2: Directs the President to appoint, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, the following permanent judgeships

provides that, for each of the judicial districts named in this Act, the first vacancy arising on the district court 10 years or more after a judge is first confirmed to fill the temporary district judgeship created by this Act shall not be filled.
Document 3: requires the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) to identify, as soon as practicable after an application for federal authorization

Each agency considering an application for federal authorization shall take certain actions as well as identify and, according to specified procedures, try to resolve issues that may delay or prevent granting of the authorization.

topic.name: Data Privacy Legislation
topic.description: Legislation aimed at protecting personal information and privacy rights of individuals in various contexts.

Document 1: Prohibits data brokers from obtaining or causing to be disclosed personal information
Requires data brokers to provide individuals a cost-free means to review their personal or identifying information.
Document 2: Amends the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998 to apply the prohibitions against collecting personal information from children to online applications
Requires verifiable parental consent for the collection, use, or disclosure of personal information of a child.
Document 3: Amends the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 to modify the purposes for which the FBI is authorized to apply for an order requiring the production of tangible things

Requires applications for such production orders to include specific and articulable facts showing that there are reasonable grounds to believe that the tangible things sought are relevant to an authorized investigation.

topic.name: Financial Regulation and Consumer Protection
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation aimed at regulating financial institutions and enhancing consumer protections in banking and investment practices.

Document 1: Amends the Revised Statutes of the United States and the Home Owners' Loan Act to declare applicable to either a national bank or federal savings association any consumer protection in state consumer law of general application
Permits the Comptroller of the Currency to preempt state law only when a comparable federal statute or regulation expressly governs the activity.
Document 2: Amends the Federal Deposit Insurance Act to require certain municipal obligations to be treated as level 2B liquid assets if they are investment grade, liquid, and readily marketable.
Document 3: Amends the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 (ERISA) to require the fiduciary of an employee benefit plan to establish policies for appointment of an investment manager
Defines 'diverse asset manager' as a minority business enterprise that manages an investment portfolio of between $100 million and $25 billion.

topic.name: Support for Innovation and Development
topic.description: Legislative efforts aimed at promoting innovation, entrepreneurship, and support systems for underrepresented communities and veterans.

Document 1: instruct the Advanced Research Projects Agency-Energy (ARPA-E) of the Department of Energy (DOE) to achieve the goals of ARPA-E through energy technology projects
promote the commercial application of advanced energy technologies.
Document 2: analyze and organize resources that list and describe organizations, programs, events, and other activities that provide assistance specifically to veterans
establish a direct community reintegration support program to award grants to create or expand community-based veterans reintegration and support programs.
Document 3: encouraging distressed communities to support the formation of business incubators to promote innovation and entrepreneurship
providing entrepreneurs with resources and services to produce viable businesses that can help create jobs and restore vitality to distressed areas.

topic.name: Legislative Actions on Food and Services
topic.description: This cluster discusses various legislative measures aimed at regulating food labeling, enhancing food assistance programs, and promoting local agriculture.

Document 1: Designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 6310 North University Street in Peoria, Illinois, as the 'Charles 'Chip' Lawrence Chan Post Office Building.
Document 2: Trans Fat Truth in Labeling Act of 2011 - Directs the Commissioner of Food and Drugs (FDA) to promulgate a final regulation revising federal nutrition labeling regulations.
prohibit the label or labeling on such a food from indicating that the trans fat content per serving is zero.
Document 3: Amends the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 regarding the supplemental food assistance program (SNAP, formerly known as the food stamp program).
Increases funding for community food projects and the seniors farmers' market nutrition program.

topic.name: Veterans' Rights and Benefits
topic.description: This cluster addresses various legislative measures aimed at protecting and enhancing the rights and benefits of servicemembers and veterans.

Document 1: requires that the Department of Labor's employment and training transition program include information about veterans' benefits
monthly amounts deducted from Department of Veterans Affairs disability compensation
Document 2: prohibits considering a person mentally incompetent for firearm rights
right to receive or transport firearms without judicial authority
Document 3: amends the Energy Employees Occupational Illness Compensation Program Act
entitled to compensation for chronic beryllium disease under the program

topic.name: Health and Disability Legislation
topic.description: Legislation aimed at improving health care, safety, and support services for individuals with disabilities and genetic disorders.

Document 1: Hereditary hemorrhagic telangiectasia (HHT) initiative to assist in coordinating activities to improve early detection, screening, and treatment of people who suffer from HHT.
Establish the HHT Coordinating Committee to develop and coordinate implementation of a plan to advance research and understanding of HHT.
Document 2: Establish a demonstration program to award grants to develop an autism navigator program for individuals with autism spectrum disorder.
Develop, demonstrate, and disseminate a standard curriculum for training first responders in assisting individuals with autism.
Document 3: Authorize the Attorney General to make grants to law enforcement agencies to reduce the risk of injury and death relating to the wandering characteristics of individuals with autism.
Provide education and resources to law enforcement agencies to increase personal safety and survival skills for individuals with disabilities.

topic.name: Career and Educational Development
topic.description: The documents focus on legislative acts aimed at enhancing career and technical education, promoting student success, and addressing youth challenges in educational settings.

develop and implement an American Technical Training Grant Program
Document 2: establish a National Parents Corps program to promote safety
combat youth violence and substance abuse in public middle or secondary schools
Document 3: authorizes appropriations for the programs under titles I, II, III, and IV of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act
gives states and LEAs flexibility in transferring funds among the programs

topic.name: Land Management and Conservation

topic.name: Small Business Administration Programs
topic.description: Legislation and initiatives aimed at enhancing support and funding for small businesses through various programs and grants administered by the Small Business Administration.

streamline the Program's loan approval process.
Document 2: Amends the Small Business Act to consider an individual with a net worth of less than $1.5 million as eligible for participation in a Small Business Administration (SBA) program
Increases from: (1) 23% to 25% the government-wide small business procurement contract goal.
Document 3: Amends the Small Business Act with respect to the authority of the Small Business Administration (SBA) to use certain SBA programs
SBA shall only use such programs to deliver entrepreneurial development services.

topic.name: Immigration and Military Service
topic.description: Legislation addressing immigration policies related to military enlistment and employment-based visas.

Document 1: Amends citizenship and residency qualifications for enlistment in the armed forces
permits enlistment of additional persons who have resided continuously in a lawful status in the United States
Document 2: Amends the Immigration and Nationality Act to eliminate the per country numerical limitation for employment-based immigrants
increase the per country numerical limitation for family based immigrants
Document 3: Amends the Immigration and Nationality Act to include within the H-2A nonimmigrant visa category an alien coming temporarily to the United States to work as a sheepherder
Provides for a three-year initial period of admission with additional three-year extensions

topic.name: Government Accountability and Rights
topic.description: This topic encompasses legislation aimed at improving accountability in government processes and protecting the rights of specific groups such as military personnel and the elderly.

Document 1: require complainants to be notified of their rights
investigation and resolution of complaints to be completed no later than 90 days
Document 2: assessing the fairness, effectiveness, timeliness, safety, integrity, and accessibility of adult guardianship
implement necessary changes in light of assessments
Document 3: require each executive agency to make its strategic plan available
establish government performance goals for the current and next fiscal years

topic.name: Counterterrorism Legislation
topic.description: This topic encompasses laws and acts related to the detention, prosecution, and interrogation of individuals associated with terrorism and national security threats.

Document 1: Replaces the term 'unprivileged enemy combatant' with 'unlawful enemy combatant'
Allows the President to authorize the detention of any unlawful enemy combatant until determining that the individual is no longer a threat
Document 2: Requires the Director of National Intelligence to report on foreign countries relating to electromagnetic pulse (EMP) weapons
Document 3: Amends the Detainee Treatment Act of 2005 to require procedures for the interrogation of unprivileged enemy belligerents
Requires the Secretary to notify Congress within 60 days after any modifications to the interrogation procedures

topic.name: Tariff Schedule Amendments
topic.description: The documents discuss amendments to the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States related to the temporary suspension of duties on specific goods.

Document 1: Amends the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States to extend the temporary suspension of duty on certain refracting and reflecting telescopes.
temporary suspension of duty
Document 2: Amends the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States to extend the temporary suspension of duty on certain acrylic staple fibers.
temporary suspension of duty
Document 3: Amends the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States to suspend temporarily the duty on ion exchange resin, polystyrene crosslinked with divinylbenzene, quaternary amonium chloride.
suspend temporarily the duty

topic.name: Pharmaceutical and Safety Legislation
topic.description: Legislation focused on the approval, marketing, and safety standards of pharmaceutical products and related consumer safety measures.

Document 2: Christen O'Donnell Equestrian Helmet Labeling Act of 2016

Document 3: Biologics Price Competition and Innovation Act of 2007
allow a person to submit an application for licensure of a biological product based on its similarity to a licensed biological product
